title: cryptocarya procera
intro: Cryptocarya procera, also known as the Mountain Pepper or Tukau, is a species of flowering plant in the laurel family, native to Australia and New Guinea. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Cryptocarya procera include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Cryptocarya procera are typically made into teas, tinctures, or oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
